label: Shimmer drift faster + blur_shimmer softens spiral arms
notes: Two changes: (1) Center drift speed 0.24/0.19 → 0.42/0.33, amplitude 0.24 → 0.38 — was too slow to see at prior speeds (took ~14s per feature traversal, now ~2.4s). (2) Added blur_shimmer blurTOP (28px Gaussian) between glsl_shimmer and null_shimmer — softens sharp spiral arm edges into diffuse glowing vortex energy. Chain: glsl_shimmer → blur_shimmer → null_shimmer → comp_shimmer.

operations.note: Increased center drift: amplitude 0.24→0.38, speed t*0.24→t*0.42, t*0.19→t*0.33
